source: HIrisPlex-S DNA Phenotyping Webtool User Manual v2.0 (2018), Erasmus MC

eye_colour.composition: 9,188 from 8 European countries (NL, NO, EE, UK, FR, IT, ES, GR) [Liu 2009 + Walsh 2012] + 278 US-based [Walsh 2017]

skin_colour.composition: Ireland/Greece/Poland + US-based (parental origins incl. Nigeria, Mexico, India, Bangladesh, China, Japan, etc.) + CEPH-HGDP Senegal/Nigeria/Kenya/Papua New Guinea [Walsh 2017]
skin_colour.note: most ancestrally diverse of the three models

interpretation: Eye and hair models are ~85-97% European-derived; reported accuracies are European accuracies. Discordance is expected to be structured by genomic background (ancestry), not random — this patterning is the project's thesis and is documented, not computed, this week.
